1. The probability of getting at least one heart in the next 5 cards can be calculated using the complement rule. The total number of ways to choose 5 cards from 52 is C(52, 5). The number of ways to choose 5 cards without any hearts is C(39, 5). The probability of no hearts is C(39, 5)/C(52, 5). The probability of at least one heart is 1 - [C(39, 5)/C(52, 5)]. This is the closed form of the probability.
